strengths: ~20 years of hands-on engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure, and data systems — comfortably meets the 15-year minimum.
Active AI-agent and tooling work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) demonstrates current, applied AI builder fluency.
Founder of GISCollective and consistent community educator (talks, workshops, open-source libraries) show entrepreneurial initiative and the ability to inspire and share externally.
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in AI or a related field — holds a BS in Computer Science and a design degree, which is a gap against a strongly preferred qualification.
Current and historical titles are Staff/Senior, not principal or director-level IC; there is limited evidence of operating at the strategic advisory scope the role demands.
AI involvement is recent and narrowly scoped (MCP tooling at one employer); no demonstrated track record of building or shipping production AI-powered products or platforms at scale.
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine breadth — two decades across stacks, geographies, and domains — and his current work on AI-agent infrastructure signals a timely pivot toward the role's focus area. However, the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role is a director-level position requiring recognized AI platform expertise and the ability to advise enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption at scale; the candidate's AI experience is too recent, too narrow, and unaccompanied by the advanced credentials or large-scale platform outcomes that would substantiate that level of influence and credibility.
